hero.headline: Crop production that doesn't depend on the weather.
hero.sub: NOVACROP delivers stable, predictable harvests using water from the Yrenda Aquifer. Less risk, more profitability.

problem.headline: Traditional farming plays roulette with the weather.
problem.description: Droughts, irregular rainfall, and unpredictable seasons destroy entire harvests — and with them, years of profitability. Modern agricultural businesses can't afford that.

stats.label: of producers report climate-related losses at least once every 3 years
average yield reduction during severe drought years
higher investment risk compared to controlled irrigation systems

solution.headline: The water Paraguay has beneath its feet.
solution.description: The Yrenda Aquifer is one of South America's most important underground water reserves. NOVACROP uses it sustainably to guarantee year-round irrigation water, regardless of rainfall.
points: Controlled, efficient irrigation all year long

benefits.headline: Produce without uncertainty. Invest with confidence.

items.title: Productive stability
items.description: Predictable harvests regardless of climate conditions. Your planning has a real foundation.

items.title: Higher yields
items.description: Controlled irrigation optimizes every hectare. More output per area, less resource waste.

items.title: 365-day production
items.description: No dead seasons. Year-round cultivation to maximize the return on your investment.

items.title: Calculable profitability
items.description: Investors and producers can project real returns. Guaranteed water eliminates the most critical variable.

items.title: Strategic water resource
items.description: Direct access to the Yrenda Aquifer, one of the largest in the region. We don't rely on rainfall or external water infrastructure.

items.title: Paraguay as a competitive advantage
items.description: Productive land, competitive operating costs, and a world-class aquifer. A hard combination to beat.

items.title: Economic results focus
items.description: We don't just talk agriculture — we talk profitability. Every decision is oriented toward investor and producer returns.

items.title: Technology applied to the field
items.description: Precision irrigation systems, crop monitoring and management focused on efficiency and traceability.

contact.headline: Want to know how NOVACROP can work with you?
contact.description: Fill out the form and an advisor will reach out to understand your situation and present our proposal.
